metadata.description: Batch 13 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1201-1300; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: a person or document that gives directions; to direct someone
words.definitionTh: คู่มือ / ผู้นำทาง
words.example: Use this guide to install the software.

words.definitionEn: responsible for doing something wrong
a musical instrument with strings
a weapon that fires bullets
words.example: The police officer carried a gun.

words.definitionEn: a man or person
words.definitionTh: ผู้ชาย / คน
words.example: That guy works in our team.

words.definitionEn: a place where people exercise
words.example: I go to the gym after work.

words.definitionEn: something you do regularly
words.definitionTh: นิสัย / ความเคยชิน
words.example: Checking the screen became a daily habit.

words.definitionEn: the strands growing on a person's or animal's body
one of two equal parts
words.definitionTh: ครึ่งหนึ่ง
words.example: Half of the team attended the meeting.

words.definitionEn: a large room or passage inside a building
words.definitionTh: ห้องโถง / ทางเดิน
words.example: The event was held in the main hall.

words.definitionEn: the body part at the end of the arm; to give something
words.definitionTh: มือ / ส่งให้

words.definitionEn: to deal with something; the part used to hold an object
words.definitionTh: จัดการ / ด้ามจับ
words.example: The operator handled the issue correctly.

words.definitionEn: to attach something at the top so the lower part is free
words.example: Hang the sign on the wall.

words.definitionEn: to take place
in a happy way
words.definitionTh: อย่างมีความสุข

words.definitionEn: the state of being happy
feeling pleased or satisfied
words.example: I am happy with the result.

words.definitionEn: difficult, firm, or with great effort
words.definitionTh: ยาก / แข็ง / อย่างหนัก

words.definitionEn: almost not
words.example: I could hardly hear the alarm.

words.definitionEn: damage or injury; to cause damage
words.definitionTh: อันตราย / ทำอันตราย
words.example: The chemical can harm the environment.

words.definitionEn: causing damage or injury
words.definitionTh: เป็นอันตราย
words.example: The gas is harmful to health.

words.definitionEn: a covering worn on the head
to dislike someone or something very much
words.definitionTh: เกลียด / ความเกลียด

words.definitionEn: to own, experience, or perform an action
used to say that something is necessary
words.example: You have to wear safety shoes.

words.definitionEn: used to refer to a male person
the top part of the body; to lead or move toward
words.definitionTh: ศีรษะ / มุ่งหน้า

words.definitionEn: a pain in the head
words.definitionTh: อาการปวดศีรษะ
words.example: The noise gave me a headache.

words.definitionEn: the title of a news story
words.definitionTh: พาดหัวข่าว

words.definitionEn: the condition of the body and mind
words.example: Exercise is good for your health.

words.definitionEn: in good physical or mental condition
to notice sound with the ears
the ability to hear or a formal meeting to examine evidence
words.definitionTh: การได้ยิน / การพิจารณาคดี

words.definitionEn: the organ that pumps blood
high temperature; to make something hot
words.definitionTh: ความร้อน / ทำให้ร้อน

words.definitionEn: a system or process that makes a place warm
words.definitionTh: ระบบทำความร้อน

words.definitionEn: a place believed to be where God or good people are after death
words.example: They believed the spirit went to heaven.

words.definitionEn: to a great degree or with a lot of weight
weighing a lot
words.example: This box is too heavy to lift.

words.definitionEn: the back part of the foot or shoe
words.definitionTh: ส้นเท้า / ส้นรองเท้า
words.example: Her shoe has a broken heel.

words.definitionEn: the distance from the bottom to the top
words.example: Measure the height of the tank.

words.definitionEn: an aircraft with rotating blades
words.definitionTh: เฮลิคอปเตอร์

words.definitionEn: a place of punishment after death in some religions
words.example: The story describes a journey through hell.

words.definitionEn: used when meeting or greeting someone
words.example: She said hello to the visitor.

words.definitionEn: to make something easier; assistance
words.definitionTh: ช่วย / ความช่วยเหลือ
words.example: Can you help me check the sensor?

words.definitionEn: giving help or useful
words.definitionTh: มีประโยชน์ / ช่วยเหลือ

words.definitionEn: used to refer to a female person or something belonging to her
words.definitionTh: เธอ / ของเธอ

words.definitionEn: in or at this place
a person admired for courage or achievements
words.example: The firefighter was treated as a hero.

words.definitionEn: belonging to a female person
used when a female person is both subject and object
to pause before doing something because you are uncertain
words.example: Do not hesitate to ask questions.

words.definitionEn: used to attract attention or greet someone
words.example: Hey, please look at this result.

words.definitionEn: used as an informal greeting
to put something where it cannot be seen or found
far above the ground or greater than usual
to emphasize; the most important part
words.definitionTh: เน้น / จุดเด่น

words.definitionEn: very or to a high degree
a raised area of land smaller than a mountain
words.example: The factory is near a hill.

words.definitionEn: used to refer to a male person as the object
used when a male person is both subject and object
to employ or pay to use something
words.definitionTh: จ้าง / เช่า
words.example: The company hired a new engineer.

words.definitionEn: belonging to a male person
important in history
words.definitionTh: สำคัญทางประวัติศาสตร์

words.definitionEn: connected with the past or history
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับประวัติศาสตร์

words.definitionEn: the study or record of past events
words.definitionTh: ประวัติศาสตร์
words.example: The book explains the history of the company.

words.definitionEn: to strike something; an act of striking
words.definitionTh: ตี / การกระแทก

words.definitionEn: an activity done for enjoyment in free time
a team sport played with sticks and a ball or puck
to carry or keep in the hands; a grip
words.definitionTh: ถือ / การยึด

words.definitionEn: an empty space or opening in something
words.example: There is a hole in the pipe.

words.definitionEn: a time when you do not work or travel for pleasure
words.example: We are planning a short holiday.

words.definitionEn: having an empty space inside
connected with religion or a god
words.definitionTh: ศักดิ์สิทธิ์
words.example: The temple is a holy place.

words.definitionEn: the place where someone lives
work given to students to do at home
truthful and not likely to cheat
great respect; to show respect
words.definitionTh: เกียรติ / ให้เกียรติ
words.example: It was an honour to receive the award.

words.definitionEn: to want something to happen; a feeling of expectation
words.definitionTh: หวัง / ความหวัง

words.definitionEn: very unpleasant or bad
words.definitionTh: เลวร้าย / น่ากลัว
words.example: The chemical had a horrible smell.

words.definitionEn: a strong feeling of fear or shock
words.definitionTh: ความสยองขวัญ

words.definitionEn: a large animal used for riding or work
words.example: The horse ran across the field.

words.definitionEn: a place where sick or injured people receive treatment
a person who receives guests; to organize an event
words.definitionTh: เจ้าภาพ / จัดงาน
words.example: The factory hosted a safety workshop.

words.definitionEn: having a high temperature
a building where people pay to stay
words.example: We stayed at a hotel near the station.

words.definitionEn: a period of sixty minutes
a building for people to live in; to provide space for
words.definitionTh: บ้าน / จัดเก็บ
words.example: The building houses the control system.

words.definitionEn: all the people living together in one home
homes provided for people
words.definitionTh: ที่อยู่อาศัย
words.example: The city needs more affordable housing.

words.definitionEn: in what way or to what degree
used to introduce a contrast
words.definitionTh: อย่างไรก็ตาม
words.example: The idea is useful; however, it is expensive.

words.definitionEn: extremely large
words.example: The improvement created a huge benefit.

words.definitionEn: relating to people; a person
words.definitionTh: มนุษย์ / เกี่ยวกับมนุษย์

words.definitionEn: funny and entertaining
the quality of being funny
words.example: She has a good sense of humour.

words.definitionEn: the number 100
words.example: The line produces one hundred units per hour.

words.definitionEn: wanting or needing food
words.example: I was hungry after the shift.

words.definitionEn: to chase animals or search for something
words.definitionTh: ล่า / ค้นหา
words.example: The team hunted for the source of the leak.

words.definitionEn: the activity of chasing wild animals or searching for something
words.definitionTh: การล่าสัตว์ / การค้นหา
words.example: Hunting is restricted in this area.
